append_prompt.title: Append Prompt
append_prompt.description: Extra text appended to the prompt

model.title: Model
model.description: Model name or ID passed to `agy --model`.

effort.title: Effort
effort.description: Model effort variant from `agy models`, combined with the base model name for `agy --model`.

print_timeout.title: Print Timeout
print_timeout.description: Timeout passed to `agy --print-timeout`, for example `5m0s` or `30s`.

add_dir.title: Additional Directories
add_dir.description: Extra directories passed as repeated `agy --add-dir` values.

context_window.title: Context Window
context_window.description: Context window used for Vibe Kanban's context usage gauge. Antigravity CLI does not currently expose exact token usage, so usage is estimated.

base_command_override.title: Base Command Override
base_command_override.description: Override the base command with a custom command

additional_params.title: Additional Parameters
additional_params.description: Additional parameters to append to the base command

env.title: Environment Variables
env.description: Environment variables to set when running the executor
